---
title: 'Developing Data Products: Plotly'
author: "Chris Luchterhand"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

This plot is an interactive histogram of eruptions by the Old Faithful geyser.
```{r plotly, echo=TRUE}
library(plotly)

plot_ly(
  faithful,
  x = ~eruptions,
  type = "histogram",
  nbinsx = 30,
  marker = list(
    color = "lightblue",
    line = list(
      color = "black",
      width = 1
    )
  )
)
```
